etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, 'tree') + 寸(寸) (cùn, 'hand') = to plant a tree -> 豆(豆) (dòu, used phonetic) added later
etymology.interpretation: The character 尌 originally depicted planting a tree with a hand, represented by 木(木) (mù, 'tree') and 寸(寸) (cùn, 'hand'). A phonetic component 豆(豆) (dòu) was added later to distinguish its meaning, although in modern forms, 木 and 豆 have visually merged into 壴.
